name: minty
description: Privacy-first personal CRM — unifies WhatsApp, Gmail, LinkedIn, Telegram, SMS, and Google Contacts locally. Surfaces who you should reach out to, and why.
author: Sree Sanakkayala

scripts.linkedin:setup: npm install playwright --save-optional && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.demo: npm run seed:demo && MINTY_DEMO=1 node crm/server.js
scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/schema.test.js tests/unit/utils.test.js tests/unit/scoring.test.js tests/unit/contact-index.test.js tests/unit/sync.test.js tests/unit/sync-utils.test.js tests/unit/health-ring.test.js tests/unit/goals.test.js tests/unit/reconnect.test.js tests/unit/calendar.test.js tests/unit/network-query.test.js tests/unit/staleness.test.js tests/unit/merge-rosters.test.js tests/unit/people-graph.test.js tests/unit/seed-dev-data.test.js tests/unit/source-progress.test.js tests/unit/notifications.test.js tests/unit/search.test.js tests/unit/palette.test.js tests/unit/query-reasons.test.js tests/unit/response-metrics.test.js tests/unit/mentions.test.js tests/unit/export.test.js tests/unit/life-events.test.js tests/unit/goal-pipeline.test.js tests/unit/goal-retro.test.js tests/unit/meeting-debrief.test.js tests/unit/whatsapp-resolution.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-connect.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-credentials.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-csv.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-totp.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-lock.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-origin-check.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-parse-connections.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-parse-messages.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-scrape.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-session-expiry.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-sync-state.test.js tests/unit/linkedin-tos-gate.test.js tests/unit/ui-js-syntax.test.js tests/integration/linkedin-api.test.js
